meta.title: Edit Tag MP3 Online & Add Cover Image Free
meta.description: Edit MP3 tags online, add cover image to MP3, update artist, title & album metadata. Free, fast and no upload limits on tagsmp3.com

hero.title: Edit MP3 Tags Online & Add Cover Image
hero.description: Upload your MP3, edit ID3 tags, and add image to MP3 in seconds. Fast, free and easy to use — no software needed. Change MP3 tags, update artist, title and album, and add cover image to MP3. Works instantly in your browser.
hero.dropzoneIdle: Upload MP3 to Edit Tags & Add Cover
hero.dropzoneReading: Processing your MP3 and loading tags...
hero.dropzoneDescription: Drag & drop your MP3 or click to upload. Edit MP3 tags and add image to MP3 instantly — fast and free.
hero.dropzoneSupport: Supports MP3 • Add cover (PNG, JPG, WEBP)

items.title: Edit MP3 Tags Online
items.description: Change MP3 tags online: title, artist, album, track, genre, year and filename. Easy-to-use ID3 tag editor.

items.title: Image to MP3 (Cover Art)
items.description: Add cover image to MP3 or update artwork in seconds. Works with PNG, JPG and WEBP formats.

items.title: Fast & Free MP3 Editor
items.description: Upload MP3, edit tags and download instantly. No install, no limits, 100% free MP3 tag editor online.

file.readyDescription: Metadata is loaded. You can keep editing tags and cover art.

status.saved: Done. Your updated MP3 is downloading.
status.saveFailed: Could not save the updated file.

warnings.coverPending: Warning: cover art is selected but not saved yet.

errors.readFailed: Could not read the MP3 file.
errors.saveFailed: Could not save the updated MP3.

cover.empty: This file does not have embedded cover art yet.
cover.instructions: Supports PNG, JPG, and WEBP. Add cover image to MP3 easily — square images work best and are auto-optimized for embedding.

footer.text: MP3 Tag Editor keeps the production flow simple: upload, edit, and download.

cookies.bannerText: This site uses cookies and similar technologies for essential functionality and to remember your cookie consent preference.
